message:
Add Markdown formatting best practice

🤖 Generated with [Claude Code](https://claude.com/claude-code)

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -0,0 +1,9 @@
+---
+title: Add Markdown formatting best practice
+type: change
+author: mavam
+component: changelog
+created: 2025-12-05T06:35:07.730119Z
+---
+
+The skill now advises to use backticks for code and technical terms, and to use emphasis and bold where it improves clarity.

@@ -1,6 +1,6 @@
 {
   "name": "changelog",
-  "version": "0.1.1",
+  "version": "0.1.2",
   "description": "Manage changelogs and release notes with tenzir-changelog",
   "author": {
     "name": "Tenzir",

@@ -152,3 +152,4 @@ uvx tenzir-changelog show -m v5.0.0 --root ~/core --root ~/cloud > release-notes
 7. **Preview first** - Always preview releases before committing
 8. **Validate in CI** - Automate validation to enforce metadata completeness
 9. **Consistent components** - Document and reuse component labels
+10. **Use Markdown deliberately** - Frame code and technical terms in backticks (e.g., `--option 42`, `cmd`). Use _emphasis_ and **bold** where it improves clarity
